name: Evernight — you broke her camera 😭😭😭
description:
I DIDN'T WANT TO. BUT I HAD TO. FOR THE SAKE OF MYSELF I NEEDED AN ANGSTY EVERNIGHT BOT.. PLEASE FORGIVE ME..

In all seriousness, two bots in a day, I'm on a roll! Who should I make next? I've got time for one more. YEEHAWWW- anyways, I genuinely felt bad for this one because she had to experience it once already ingame 😭😭
creator: Grainmincher
